original_question:
A straight line passing through the point $(0,4)$ is perpendicular to the line $x-3y-7=0$. Find the equation of this line.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}

A straight line passing through the point $(0,0)$ is perpendicular to the line $4x+y-8=0$. Find the equation of this line.
